Fix production: switch Railway to Dockerfile builder so yt-dlp is installed

fix: eliminate server-to-server hop in intelligence-ui, add error logging

pattern that can fail on Vercel depending on DNS/routing.

(same pattern as analytics/route.ts). Auth via Supabase session only.
Added console.error logging at each failure point (auth, MGMT_TOKEN,
OPENROUTER_API_KEY, DB query, LLM call) for Vercel log debugging.

commit.message:
Fix pmem MappingPastEof race: use per-closure padded erofs filename

The shared padded erofs file (/opt/choiros/vms/store-disk-padded.erofs)
caused MappingPastEof when multiple VMs booted concurrently during
nixos-rebuild switch. One VM would be mid-write while another read the
partially-written file.

Fix: include the nix store hash in the padded filename so each closure
gets its own file. Old padded files are cleaned up on first VM boot
with the new closure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix sudoers: register both bundled and homebrew openfortivpn paths

When installed via DMG, the bundled openfortivpn path differs from
homebrew. sudo was rejecting the bundled binary because sudoers only
had the homebrew path.

- SudoersManager now registers both paths in sudoers
- isConfigured() validates with actual sudo execution, not just -l
- Resets cached result if app is moved to a different location
- VPNManager delegates path resolution to SudoersManager

commit.message:
security: comprehensive hardening (9 fixes) (#4)

* security: comprehensive hardening across backend, frontend, and infrastructure

- Remove default SECRET_KEY, require explicit configuration (startup error if unset)
- Move JWT tokens from URL query params to Authorization headers for report HTML/ZIP
  endpoints (blob URL approach eliminates token leakage via browser history/logs/referer)
- Add optional auth + audit logging on report asset endpoint
- Add subprocess resource limits (RLIMIT_AS 2GB) on Linux/macOS
- Add PostgreSQL pool_recycle (3600s) to prevent stale connections
- Add upload size limits: Nginx client_max_body_size 500m + FastAPI 500MB check (HTTP 413)
- Add global API rate limiting via slowapi (100/min default, stricter on expensive endpoints)
- Add thread safety to WebSocket manager (lock + copy-iterate pattern)
- Replace plaintext logging with structured JSON logging (python-json-logger)
- Add request-ID middleware for log correlation (X-Request-ID header)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci: set SECRET_KEY for E2E test environment

Backend now requires explicit SECRET_KEY (no insecure default).
Add a throwaway test key so the backend starts in CI.

commit.message:
Re-enable XEN (required for PVH boot) and add explicit PVH=yes

cloud-hypervisor uses PVH boot protocol. CONFIG_PVH depends on
CONFIG_XEN in the kernel Kconfig. Disabling XEN broke VM boot with
KernelMissingPvhHeader.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Modals: keep previously opened modals mounted for instant switching

Use display:contents/none instead of conditional rendering so modal
content stays in the DOM after first open. Eliminates remount stagger
when switching between shortcuts/contact/music modals.

commit.message:
fix: add Python version validation and compatibility warnings (#5)

- Add validate_python_version() to normalize "3.12.5" → "3.12" and reject
  invalid versions (< 3.9, non-numeric, wrong format)
- Add check_python_version_compatibility() to warn about prerelease versions
  (3.14) that may have limited package availability
- Improve create_venv task error messages: detect "No interpreter found",
  download failures, and missing package distributions with actionable hints
- Return python_version_warning field in EnvResponse when creating environments
- Frontend shows warning toast when creating env with prerelease Python
- Add Python 3.13 to CI test matrix (fail-fast: false)
- Add 17 new venv_utils tests + 5 new router tests for version validation
- i18n: pythonVersionWarning toast label in EN/DE/FR/ES

Co-authored-by: Nicole (AI) <nicole@roboscope>

commit.message:
Auto_Switch_3: Koordinaten als Form-Properties für Solar-Zeiten

Breitengrad/Längengrad direkt in der Instanz-Konfiguration einstellbar.
getSolarTime() liest jetzt aus RegisterPropertyFloat statt aus dem
Location Control Modul (GUID-Lookup entfernt).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix code smells and add knowledge base with YouTube video ingestion (#3)

Code smell fixes:
- Deduplicate profile update logic: PUT handler now calls updateProfile()
- Add safeParseArray() for JSON parsing in rowToProfile (handles malformed data)
- Extract DEFAULT_USER_ID constant, replacing hardcoded user_id = 1
- Extract VALID_ROLES constant in services/profile.ts (was magic string)
- Wrap persistNotes in try-catch and db.transaction for atomicity
- Replace array-index React keys with stable numeric IDs
- Remove redundant .filter() in historyForApi

Knowledge base & YouTube ingestion:
- Add FTS5 migration (002_knowledge_fts) over existing knowledge_base table
  with auto-sync triggers for insert/update/delete
- Add services/knowledge.ts: searchKnowledge (FTS5), persistKnowledgeEntry
- Update chat pipeline: query local KB first, supplement with web search
  only when KB has < 3 results, dedup merged sources by URL
- Add services/youtube.ts: Gemini 2.5 Flash integration that processes
  YouTube videos natively via fileData URL
- Add routes/ingest.ts: POST /api/ingest endpoint for YouTube URL ingestion
- Add @google/genai dependency and GEMINI_API_KEY to .env.example

https://claude.ai/code/session_01UsEsLz8QAXF7ikFK4hzt6P

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add signal conditioning PCB design (25x35mm)

Circuit: 24VDC -> 78L05 -> SS49E hall effect -> LM393 dual comparator
  - U3A: threshold comparator (trim pot adjustable 0.01-1.0mm)
  - U3B: 2Hz relaxation oscillator for red LED flash
  - Amber LED steady when seated, red LED 2Hz flash when deflected
  - Q1 2N7000 MOSFET gates red LED with comparator output

25 components, 25x35mm 2-layer board fits base plate PCB recess.
KiCad 8 project + SVG schematic + netlist + BOM.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Expand test coverage: unit, integration, and E2E (#340)

* Expand test coverage: unit, integration, and E2E tests

Add OPEN_COCKPIT_TEST_DIR env var to paths.js and pty-daemon.js for
test isolation — tests run against temp dirs without affecting the
running app.

New test files:
- Tier 1 (unit): secure-fs, session-stats, platform, discovery helpers
- Tier 2 (integration): session-discovery getSessions, pool lifecycle,
  daemon client with real PTY daemon
- Tier 3 (E2E): real Claude Code sessions for lifecycle, stats, API

Also adds docs/testing/ with philosophy and isolation strategy docs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Clean up test code: fix shadowing, reduce redundant requireFresh calls, reuse isPidAlive

- Rename local `stats` vars to `result` to fix variable shadowing in session-stats tests
- Remove per-test `env.requireFresh()` calls, use shared module from beforeAll
- Rewrite secure-fs and platform tests to use createTestEnv pattern
- Cache `which claude` result in claude-harness
- Add clearTimeout in e2e-api sendMessage to prevent timer leaks
- Use isPidAlive from paths.js instead of inline reimplementation in pool tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Use STATUS/POOL_STATUS constants instead of raw strings in tests

Replace stringly-typed status values with constants from session-statuses.js
across all test files. Remove duplicate Test E (PRICING structure) from E2E
suite — already covered by unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Merge origin/main into test-coverage

commit.message:
Fix UUID array key type error in status counts

Convert status.id UUID objects to strings before using them as array
keys in the statusCounts lookup. The controller indexes the array by
string UUIDs, so the template must convert the UUID objects to match.

Fixes: "Cannot access offset of type LazyUuidFromString on array" error
